text:
Hello,=20

On Sat, 2 Aug 2008 22:58:43 +0800
Volker Stolz <vs@FreeBSD.org> a =E9crit:

> Can you please double-check the options you used for palm/pilot-link, =20
> e.g. by running 'make config' in there? Maybe the problem is coming =20
> from over there.

All is on : "built-in thread safety" and "Compile with USB via libusb
support (READ MANUAL!)"
( PNG support but it is not needed)

Regards,
--=20
regis
